en: A: Is Tapas home?
She’s at home, please come in.
A: Is Simuy at home?

ab: nyux ini’ kaki’ ngasal. nanu’ zyuwaw su’ pi?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?
B: Who is it?

ab: yutas, kuzing ga Pepay. gyah cikay blihun ha ku?
en: A: Grandpa, this is Paypay, can you open the door please?

ab: yutas, kuzing ga Paypay. gyah cikay blihun ha ma’?
en: A: Grandpa, this is Paypay, can you open the door please?
B: Who are you?

ab: kuzing ga, Kaynu’. mwah saku’ cisal isu’.
en: A: I’m Kaynu’ and I’ve come to talk to you.
A: Long time no see.

ab: aw rwa! s’nun misu’ balay la. ihi, ’wah aki’ ta’ mcisal ha!
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來，我們聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s talk!
B: Please sit down and drink water.
B: Please sit down and drink water.
B: Please sit down and have some tea.
B: Please sit down and have some tea.
A: Thank you.
B: Please have some tea.

ab: talagay! blaq balay nbun ocya’ mamu!
en: A:Your tea is delicious.

ab: mniqa ta’ cikay bway qhuniq ha.
en: B: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: aw! blaq balay ktan inrkyasan na bebway qhuniq qani.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.

ab: aw! blaq balay ktan inrkyasan na baybway qhuniq qani.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.

ab: blaq su’ niqun qu bway qhuniq qani?
en: B: How is the fruit?
A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: blaq pinhapuy ni yaya’ la. ihi’ ’wah maniq la!
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!

ab: aw. hala saku’ mima’ qba’ ha.
en: A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: qiri’ maniq ki, bali su’ squliq.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: pzyux wal maku’ niqun la, mtngi’ balay la.
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.
B: Eat more, don’t be polite.
A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: mmosa’ saku’ la, wahay misu’ mita’ lozi babaw nya’.
ch: A+:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.

ab: mmawsa’ saku’ la, wahay misu’ mita’ lawzi babaw nya’.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.
B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: nyux mlhngan la. aki’ musa’ ngasal la.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.
B:Come again next time!
B:Come again next time!
B: Walk slowly and carefully.
B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: aw. mhhriq su’ ga ’wah cisal ngasal maku’.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.

ab: aw. mhayhriq su’ ga ’wah cisal ngasal maku’.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
